message:
feat(model,cli,storage): add sync_equals() implementation, create/storage/import enhancements

- model/mod.rs: implement sync_equals() and sync_compare_value() methods on
  Issue for semantically comparing issues across import/export boundaries;
  normalizes away volatile audit fields (content_hash, timestamps) while
  comparing full synced payload including labels, dependencies, comments;
  sorts and deduplicates collections for order-independent comparison;
  add comprehensive tests for sync equality semantics
- create.rs: additional ID resolution and create command improvements
- sqlite.rs: further storage query and constraint handling refinements
- markdown_import.rs: additional markdown import parsing improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
